Home / Services / Luxury Vinyl Plank Installation

Luxury Vinyl Plank Installation

Waterproof luxury vinyl perfect for basement rec rooms and busy family homes.

In Grove City's affordable neighborhoods where basement finishing is common, our luxury vinyl plank (LVP) installations solve moisture issues that damage traditional materials. We use commercial-grade planks with attached cork underlayment—essential for reducing noise in Upper Arlington's open-concept homes.

For Colonial Revivals in Bexley, we offer hand-scraped textures that mimic original hardwoods while providing waterproof protection. Our rigid core planks won't warp when basement humidity spikes during July thunderstorms.

We particularly recommend LVP for connecting spaces between indoor and outdoor living areas—the planks resist temperature extremes from Westerville's snowy winters to muggy summer evenings.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Concrete moisture testing (critical in Ohio basements)
  2. 02 Step 2: Precision laser measurements to minimize cuts in visible areas
  3. 03 Step 3: Expansion gap planning for seasonal temperature changes
  4. 04 Step 4: Seam sealing with industrial-grade waterproof adhesive

Benefits

  • 100% waterproof for basement playrooms
  • Warmer underfoot than tile during winter
  • Scratch-resistant surface for active households
  • Can be installed over most existing surfaces

Frequently Asked Questions

Will vinyl plank look cheap in my historic home?

Our artisan series replicates saw marks and grain patterns so accurately that visitors often mistake it for real wood. We recently used distressed walnut planks in a Clintonville bungalow that complemented its original craftsman details.

How does it handle winter boots?

The wear layer resists salt stains better than traditional hardwood—ideal for Dublin homes where snowy shoes are inevitable six months per year.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with luxury vinyl plank installation? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-flo-r92
